title: ContentService.onDbCorruption 零权限 Slog.wtf() 日志注入
notes: onDbCorruption(tag, msg, stackTrace) has NO permission check. Any app can call it via Binder to inject arbitrary log entries with Slog.e() and trigger Slog.wtf(). On userdebug builds, Slog.wtf() can crash system_server. On production builds, it writes to DropBox and pollutes system logs. Attacker controls tag, message, and stack trace strings.
